note: MSFT-internal Power BI embed URLs. autoAuth=true + ctid means the viewer must be signed into the Microsoft corp tenant to see the report. External visitors get a sign-in wall; that is by design. Add new reports by appending to the reports[] array.

reports.name: Super User Adoption
reports.blurb: Identify super-users, score adoption depth, and quantify org-wide impact. Dummy tenant data.

reports.name: Super User Impact
reports.blurb: Measure the productivity lift super-users create across their teams.

reports.name: AI in One
reports.blurb: Executive monthly review — adoption, sentiment, license utilisation, ROI, in one report.

reports.name: Chat Intelligence
reports.blurb: Prompt-level analytics — surfaces, depth, department breakdown, maturity curve.

reports.name: Agent Intelligence
reports.blurb: Agent-level telemetry — invocations, authors, shipped-but-unused candidates.

reports.name: Adoption & Sentiment
reports.blurb: M365 Copilot adoption and end-user sentiment in one view.

reports.name: AI Solutions Intelligence
reports.blurb: Portfolio view of AI solutions deployed across the org.

reports.name: Champion ID
reports.blurb: Identify and rank Copilot champions across the org — surfaces top advocates, influence reach, and enablement candidates. From the customizecopilot repo.

reports.name: ROI Calculator
reports.blurb: Interactive M365 Copilot ROI model — adjust inputs, see payback period, productivity lift, and license-cost recovery live. Public, no sign-in required.
